original_title: C-2570 Married Woman Affair Travel The BEST 2019, Feb-2019, Dec
overview: "I want to believe in the love and bond of the couple, but as it is ..." A married woman who struggles between ideal and reality set out on a journey with a man she met for the first time. The director re-edits 6 works released from February to December 2019 from the life work "Married Woman Affair Travel" directed by Koichi Takahashi. Extracted and condensed recordings of encounters with married women, travel patterns, hot springs, and even the first sex. A 39-year-old married woman who knows that her child has a difficult constitution and is undergoing fertility treatment, but is currently sexless. A 240-minute work that includes 6 episodes of "A real married woman and a one-night, two-day excursion" such as a married woman who went on a trip with distress ... and pant as if she tasted a penis for the first time in a long time (# 190).
title: C 2570
